# YouTube generated output

This folder was generated from the `YouTube` ENORM model version `3.2`.

## Generated files
- `src/generated/youtube/YouTubeApplication.java`
- `src/generated/youtube/model/Users.java`
- `src/generated/youtube/model/Resources.java`
- `src/generated/youtube/model/Contexts.java`
- `src/generated/youtube/model/Relations.java`
- `src/generated/youtube/model/Feedback.java`
- `src/generated/youtube/governance/YouTubeGovernance.java`
- `src/generated/youtube/runtime/RuleBodies.java`

## Runtime profile
`media-platform`

## Notes
This single Acceleo module supports Amazon, Reddit, and YouTube by reading the same ENORM metamodel and the corresponding instance models.
